overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountain landscape at dawn. The character traverses narrow rocky passages, open vistas with dramatic cloud formations, and ancient stone ruins while the camera follows smoothly from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain canyon with high rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky passage between tall snow-covered boulders

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the left wall of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the right wall of the canyon
single tall evergreen tree growing from the rocky slope
snow-capped mountain visible through the canyon opening ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow, enclosed mountain canyon with high snow-covered rock walls on both sides. The character walks forward along a dirt trail with limited sky visibility, passing a tall pine tree on the left as distant mountains become visible through the canyon opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow with panoramic views of distant peaks

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into an open mountain vista with dramatic golden-hour clouds

agents.ego_description: walking across open terrain toward distant snow-capped peaks with dramatic cloud formations

entered.detail: wide grassy area with patches of snow replacing the narrow canyon
orange and pink illuminated clouds hovering over the distant mountain range
expansive mountain range with snow-covered summits visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens dramatically as the canyon walls fall away to reveal a vast mountain vista. The character walks across an open meadow with patches of snow, heading toward distant peaks illuminated by golden-hour light. The sky is filled with dramatic orange-tinged clouds while scattered pine trees dot the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins passage with wall structures

events.description: approaches and enters ancient stone ruins with tall weathered wall structures on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through the stone ruins and passing between ancient wall structures

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone wall with stacked block construction
tall stone wall ruins casting shadows across the path
broken stone columns and architectural remains scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a zone of ancient stone ruins, walking between tall weathered walls that create a semi-enclosed passage. The stone structures flank the path on both sides while distant mountains remain visible through gaps in the ruins. The ground transitions back to a dirt trail as the character navigates through the historical architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with scattered stone ruins

events.description: exits the confined stone passage back into open landscape with valley views
camera turns slightly to the right revealing more of the valley and distant forest

agents.ego_description: continuing through open terrain with stone ruins scattered around while surveying the valley

entered.detail: sweeping view of the mountain valley with forested slopes and distant peaks
low stone wall remains and foundation stones spread across the grassland

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stone ruins back into open terrain, revealing a sweeping valley view with forested mountain slopes. The camera turns slightly to showcase the expansive landscape while the character continues walking past scattered stone remains. The distant snowy peaks shift to the left as the path curves through the highland meadow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic mountain canyon into a vast, open alpine vista. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail enclosed by high, snow-covered rock walls, passing a solitary pine tree as the path leads toward a distant opening. As the character moves forward, the canyon walls dramatically fall away to reveal an expansive mountain landscape. The scene then opens into a wide meadow dotted with patches of snow and scattered pines, while the lighting shifts to a warm golden hour. Finally, the camera follows the character toward distant peaks under a sky filled with dramatic, orange-tinged clouds.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of ancient ruins into a sweeping, open mountain vista. It begins with the character navigating a semi-enclosed passage between tall, weathered stone walls that flank a dirt trail. As the character moves forward, the restrictive architecture gradually gives way to the surrounding environment, with distant mountains appearing through gaps in the ruins. The scene then opens completely as the character emerges from the stone structures into a highland meadow, revealing a vast valley with forested slopes. Finally, the camera turns slightly to showcase the expansive landscape, shifting the perspective toward snowy peaks as the path curves through the open terrain.
